tagline: Spain: Where passion meets paradise in every sun-kissed street and flamenco beat.
top_places: 1. Barcelona - Iconic Gaudí architecture like Sagrada Família. 2. Madrid - Royal Palace, Prado Museum. 3. Seville - Alcázar Palace. 4. Granada - Alhambra fortress. 5. Toledo - Medieval city.
culture: Greet with two cheek kisses; late dinners (9pm+); tipping optional 5-10%.
tips: Best time: Spring/Fall. Budget: $90-220/day. EU: no visa needed. Watch for pickpockets.
food: Paella, Jamón Ibérico, Tortilla Española, Gazpacho. Nightlife: Ibiza, Barcelona, Madrid.

tagline: Morocco: Where ancient medinas meet golden dunes in a tapestry of spice and color.
top_places: 1. Marrakech Medina. 2. Fes Medina. 3. Chefchaouen (Blue City). 4. Sahara Desert. 5. Ait Benhaddou.
culture: Greet with 'Salaam alaikum'; dress modestly; use right hand; haggle in souks.
tips: Best time: Mar-May/Sep-Oct. Budget: $50-100/day. 90 days visa-free for EU.
food: Tagine, Couscous, Harira, Pastilla. Nightlife: Marrakech rooftops, Casablanca clubs.

tagline: Italy: Where history whispers, cuisine captivates, and la dolce vita beckons.
top_places: 1. Rome. 2. Venice. 3. Florence. 4. Cinque Terre. 5. Amalfi Coast.
culture: Greet with buongiorno; dress modestly in churches; don't rush meals.
tips: Best time: Apr-Jun/Sep-Oct. Budget: $100-250/day. EU: free travel.
food: Carbonara, Pizza Margherita, Gelato, Tiramisù. Nightlife: Rome Testaccio, Milan Navigli.

tagline: Mexico: Where ancient wonders meet vibrant beaches and flavors that ignite the soul.
top_places: 1. Chichén Itzá. 2. Mexico City. 3. Tulum. 4. Oaxaca. 5. Guanajuato.
culture: Greet with handshake/cheek kiss; tip 10-15%; use 'usted' formally.
tips: Best time: Nov-Apr. Budget: $50-150/day. 180 days visa-free for EU.
food: Tacos al Pastor, Mole Poblano, Cochinita Pibil, Churros. Nightlife: CDMX Roma/Condesa.

tagline: Japan: Where ancient traditions meet futuristic wonders in perfect harmony.
top_places: 1. Kyoto. 2. Tokyo. 3. Mount Fuji. 4. Hiroshima & Miyajima. 5. Kanazawa.
culture: Bow to greet; remove shoes indoors; never tip; stay quiet on trains.
tips: Best time: Mar-May/Oct-Nov. Budget: $150-250/day. 90 days visa-free for EU.
food: Sushi, Ramen, Tempura, Okonomiyaki. Nightlife: Tokyo Shibuya/Shinjuku, Osaka Dotonbori.

tagline: Thailand: Where ancient temples meet turquoise beaches in eternal paradise.
top_places: 1. Bangkok Grand Palace. 2. Chiang Mai. 3. Ayutthaya. 4. Railay Beach. 5. Khao Yai.
culture: Perform wai greeting; cover up at temples; never touch heads or point feet.
tips: Best time: Nov-Feb. Budget: $50-150/day. 60 days visa-free for EU.
food: Pad Thai, Tom Yum, Green Curry, Som Tam. Nightlife: Bangkok Khao San Road, Koh Phangan.

tagline: Greece: Cradle of civilization, where ancient wonders meet sun-kissed islands.
top_places: 1. Athens Acropolis. 2. Santorini. 3. Meteora. 4. Delphi. 5. Mykonos.
culture: Firm handshake; bring gifts when visiting homes; 'siga siga' pace.
tips: Best time: May-Jun/Sep-Oct. Budget: $100-250/day. EU: free Schengen travel.
food: Souvlaki, Moussaka, Tzatziki, Grilled Octopus. Nightlife: Mykonos, Athens Psyrri.

tagline: Portugal: Where sun-kissed beaches meet timeless wonders and warm-hearted people.
top_places: 1. Lisbon. 2. Porto. 3. Sintra. 4. Algarve. 5. Douro Valley.
culture: Handshake formal; two kisses for friends; never speak Spanish to Portuguese.
tips: Best time: Apr-Jun/Sep-Oct. Budget: $100-200/day. EU: free travel.
food: Pastéis de Nata, Bacalhau, Francesinha, Sardinhas. Nightlife: Lisbon Bairro Alto, Porto Ribeira.
